regional_cost_note: Painters in Palmerston North typically charge $40–$62/hr for qualified work. Interior painting costs $22–$45/m², exterior $30–$60/m². Rates sit 10–15% below the national average due to lower business overheads, flat terrain reducing scaffolding costs, and good painter availability across the Manawatū region.

businesses.name: Complete Painting & Decorating
businesses.known_for: Interior, exterior and roof painting with a Master Painters 5-year workmanship guarantee; covers airless spraying and wallpaper hanging across greater Palmerston North.

businesses.name: Just Us Painting & Decorating
businesses.known_for: 40+ years industry experience; friendly residential painting, staining, water blasting, wallpapering and insurance repaints throughout the Manawatū.

businesses.name: Martin Beveridge Ltd
businesses.known_for: Award-winning Master Painters since 1973; NZ Master Painters Gold & Silver Award winners specialising in residential, commercial and heritage painting plus wall coverings.

businesses.name: Dassler Painting & Decorating Ltd
businesses.known_for: Master Painters NZ member since 2010; 20+ years experience in quality residential and commercial painting for new builds and refurbishments.

businesses.name: Paly Pro Painting & Plastering
businesses.known_for: Painting and plastering specialists using premium Resene and Dulux products; also covers GIB repairs, water blasting and roof painting.

businesses.name: SJP Painters & Decorators
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial painting across Palmerston North; praised for reliable communication and clean, tidy workmanship.

businesses.name: Dynamic Decorating
businesses.known_for: Interior and exterior residential painting across the Manawatū; competitive rates and strong local reputation among homeowners.
